title: Support more constants for function parameter default values

features.name: function parameter default value from parameter
features.description: Code should include a function with a parameter default value assigned from another parameter constant expression

features.name: function parameter default value from function call
features.description: Code should include a function with a parameter default value assigned from a function call expression

extraction_summary.notes: Feature request issue - no code blocks provided. Features inferred from issue description about function parameter default values supporting parameters and function calls
